title: polyscias oahuensis
intro: Polyscias oahuensis, also known as the Oahu polynesian ivy or Oahu tree nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and saponins in its leaves. The health benefits of Polyscias oahuensis include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Polyscias oahuensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the leaves in a topical ointment to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
